name: Iso11783IL_OPChangeLineAttribute
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangeLineAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangeLineAttribute( dword objectID, dword color, dword width, dword art ); // form 1
description: The function changes the properties of a line attribute object. A Change Line Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of a line attribute object
